# host-pools-declared

The structural bar for host admission: `createHostSemaphore`
(`packages/host-semaphore`) may be imported by `host-admission` only, so every
host-wide pool is declared through `defineHostPool` and takes budget from the
shared ceiling. Any other importer is an unbudgeted pool. Uses `grepImports`;
the primitive's own files reach it by relative path (never the `@plugins/...`
specifier) so they need no allowlist entry.
